items.title: Sad Bonus Hollander POTD Carey Scurry. Brooklyn hooper went to LIU & was drafted 37th by UTA in 85. Hustler & good leaper lasted 3 yrs as a bench guy (5 ppg 3 rpg). After 88, played abroad thru 97. Had struggles after retiring but got it together and wrote a book about it. RIP.
items.author: HoopsAnalyst

items.title: Apparently Mitch Johnson may have been in the wrong here. The rule book states you have to call a timeout and then give the challenge signal in the same interaction with the ref. One can’t just twirl a finger to initiate a challenge and Nate is saying in replays he never actually
items.author: Hoop Informatics
items.body_excerpt: Apparently Mitch Johnson may have been in the wrong here. The rule book states you have to call a timeout and then give the challenge signal in the same interaction with the ref. One can’t just twirl a finger to initiate a challenge and Nate is saying in replays he never actually called timeout.

items.title: Victor Wembanyama has set a Spurs franchise record for most points (324) in a player's first career postseason, besting Stephen Jackson's record of 307 set in 2003.
items.author: NBA Stat
items.body_excerpt:
Victor Wembanyama has set a Spurs franchise record for most points (324) in a player's first career postseason, besting Stephen Jackson's record of 307 set in 2003.

The league record for most points in a player's first career playoff run is 601, held by Devin Booker (2021).

(via CrazyStats)
#NBA
